justification.spending_clarity: Multiple quantified dollar amounts: $2,500 consultant fees, $8,000 in delayed revenue from rejections
justification.information_gap: Specific recurring question about panel selection order with no good answer available
justification.urgency: Revenue loss consequence is real but not immediate - therapists can survive without insurance initially
justification.create_feasibility: Process documentation is public, CAQH steps are learnable, achievable in 2-3 weeks
justification.ai_multiplier: AI can synthesize panel requirements, format checklists, and draft step-by-step guides quickly
